overview: Physician Assistant Adina Mintz provides functional medicine care via telemedicine, combining Western medicine with evidence-based functional medicine principles to identify and address root causes of health concerns. Services include nutrition therapy, stress management, sleep optimization, and lab diagnostics, supported by personalized coaching between sessions.
highlights: Health Coach and Functional Nutritionist support between sessions
Lab testing and diagnostics (conventional and specialty)
targetAudience: Anyone seeking functional medicine care that addresses root causes of health issues rather than symptom management.
